rationale: The current MDX already has the fix applied (the H2 is already '## Docker déchire'). This candidate is the most complete as it includes the humorous line about games that other candidates missed, and it correctly uses French typographic conventions (non-breaking spaces). It perfectly captures Dan's direct and informal style.

suggestionLog.reason: The H2 heading was left in English. Translating it to 'Docker déchire' matches the title and the informal tone of the original.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
